note.summary: With only 32 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals (n=22, 72.7% WR) in bearish-aligned MTF, sell-pressure CVD, strong-trend ADX, trending Hurst, and 120-240s TTC buckets show confirmed positive EV after costs and WR comfortably above breakeven; normal BB state (n=11) and range-middle also look robust. UP direction and most expansion/squeeze or vwap-above buckets remain unprofitable or too small. Sample is still tiny so all patterns carry high variance risk.
working: DOWN_STRONG + bearish_aligned MTF + sell_pressure CVD (n=17-25, WR 0.68-0.89, strong positive pnl)
normal BB state + range_middle + dead volume (n=9-12, WR 0.67-0.91)
failing: All UP buckets and UP_STRONG (negative pnl, WR << breakeven)
expansion_up, vwap_above, bullish_aligned MTF (negative pnl even where n>=8)
short TTC <60s and >=240s (negative pnl, low WR)
warnings: n=32 total; many buckets still <15 samples so high risk of noise
observe_only mode means no live execution feedback yet
strong apparent edges concentrated in DOWN/sell-pressure regimes only
changes_since_last: Initial analysis; no prior run available
focus_next: Accumulate more samples specifically in DOWN_STRONG + bearish_aligned + sell_pressure CVD
Track time-decay and z-score -1..1 stability as n grows
Monitor whether normal BB and range_middle edges persist above breakeven

history.summary: With only 20 settled trades (n>=8 threshold applied), DOWN_STRONG signals in trending/strong ADX regimes, normal BB state, 120-240s TTC, bearish supertrend, sell-pressure CVD, and tight-spread conditions show confirmed positive EV (win rates 0.68-1.0, avg_ev_after_cost ~0.16-0.19). UP signals, long TTC, expansion/squeeze BB, and mixed/neutral CVD states remain under-sampled or negative. Sample too small for robust confirmation beyond these coarse filters.
changes_since_last: First analysis; no prior baseline

history.summary: With only 20 settled trades (n=20 total), DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes, strong ADX, normal BB state, bearish-aligned MTF, sell-pressure CVD, and 120-240s TTC show confirmed positive EV (wr 0.69-1.0, all n>=8) while UP signals and several z-score/BB states remain too sparse or negative. Sample size is still marginal for most buckets; overall EV after cost is modestly positive but driven by a handful of overlapping bearish conditions.
changes_since_last: First analysis; no prior results available

history.summary: With n=20 total settled trades (mostly DOWN_STRONG in trending regimes), confirmed profitable patterns include DOWN_STRONG (n=14, WR 0.714), strong_trend ADX (n=13, WR 0.769), normal BB state (n=9, WR 1.0), 120-240s TTC (n=10, WR 0.8), bearish_aligned MTF (n=8, WR 0.875), and sell_pressure CVD (n=8, WR 1.0), all showing positive EV after costs. history.summary: With only 20 settled trades (n=20 overall, 0.65 WR, +4.13 USD, +0.162 EV), DOWN_STRONG signals in trending/strong_trend regimes, normal BB state, sell_pressure CVD, bearish supertrend, and 120-240s TTC show confirmed positive EV above breakeven with n>=8; most other buckets remain below n=8 threshold and are noise. UP signals and expansion/squeeze BB states are unprofitable but lack sufficient samples. No material changes possible without prior_analysis; selectivity remains extremely high (20/10449).

With only 20 settled trades, patterns with n>=8 show confirmation in DOWN_STRONG signals (n=14, WR=0.714), trending/hurst (n=19, WR=0.684), strong_trend ADX (n=13, WR=0.769), bearish_aligned MTF (n=8, WR=0.875), sell_pressure CVD (n=8, WR=1.0), bb_normal (n=9, WR=1.0), and 120-240s TTC (n=10, WR=0.8), all with positive EV after costs.
